title: Grassy Japanese Bacon Tamagoyaki
description: A keto-friendly Japanese dish featuring bacon lardon and candy, served in a bamboo steamer, perfect for a hangover cure. This grassy and creamy tamagoyaki is a unique twist on traditional Japanese cuisine.
instructions: Preheat the bamboo steamer by filling it with boiling water and letting it sit for 5 minutes.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, soy sauce, salt, and pepper.
Add the chopped spinach, green onion, and crushed candy to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Heat the sesame oil in a small pan over medium heat and cook the diced bacon lardon until crispy.
Add the cooked bacon lardon to the bowl and stir until well combined.
Pour the egg mixture into a greased tamagoyaki pan and cook over medium heat until the edges start to set.
Use a spatula to gently lift and fold the edges of the tamagoyaki towards the center.
Continue cooking and folding the tamagoyaki until it is almost set.
Transfer the tamagoyaki to the preheated bamboo steamer and steam for 5 minutes.
Serve the Grassy Japanese Bacon Tamagoyaki hot, garnished with additional chopped green onion and soy sauce if desired.
